name: Spread Out! Hold Naar' Havok
developer: Paul Lahmy, Yili Zhu, Thomas Bocquet, Jérémy Auclair, Ethan Perrod, Robin Ducret, Hugo Pacalet
short_description: Easy and deep wargame. Choose your army (the Elves or the Orcs), win the war by controlling 5 of the 9 territories or by killing the enemy king. Deploy reinforcements.
detailed_description:
Spread Out: Hold Naar'Havok offers an original, multiplayer synthesis between wargames, chess and the game of go. Choose your army: the Elves or the Orcs. Win the battle by controlling 5 of the 9 territories, or by surrounding the enemy king. Earn reinforcement points by holding territories. Command four types of units, with specific abilities: knights/boar-riders, magicians/sorcerers, griffins/dragons, the Elf-king/ the Ork-king. The battle begins with the deployment phase, followed by the movement phase, combat phase and reinforcement phase.
Join the Facebook page to find other players : Spread Out Hold Naar'Havok.
